name: Webhook Receiver
summary: Listens on a configurable HTTP path and emits an event for each incoming webhook request.
description:
# Webhook Receiver

Registers an HTTP endpoint in the FlowDSL runtime and emits a `WebhookPayload` event for each incoming request. Supports HMAC signature verification for secure webhook receipt.

## Use cases
- Receive Stripe, GitHub, or Slack webhook events
- Trigger flows from third-party system callbacks
- Accept inbound API calls from external services

## Notes
- The `path` must be unique within a deployment
- When `secret` is set, requests without a valid HMAC signature are rejected with HTTP 401
- The `body` field is the raw request body as a string; use `flowdsl/json-transformer` to parse it

outputs.name: WebhookPayload
outputs.description: Emitted for each incoming HTTP request to the registered path.

method.description: HTTP method of the incoming request.

path.description: The path on which the request was received.

receivedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was received.

path.title: Path
path.description: HTTP path to register for this webhook. Must start with '/'.

secret.title: Signing Secret
secret.description: HMAC secret for request signature verification. Leave empty to accept all requests.
